config.script:
#define TYPEID_SPECIAL_COMMAND 1 #define TYPEID_SELFMAPID 2 #define TYPEID_FIRST_STANDARD 10000 #define AUTOSAVE_COUNT 200 #define DEFAULT_MATCH_MODE 3
#define ERRCODE_SAVE_FAILED -1 #define ERRCODE_MATCH_FAILED -2 #define ERRCODE_NEWOBJ_FAILED -3 #define ERRCODE_GETOBJ_FAILED -4 #define ERRCODE_INSERT_NOTALLWD -5
#define ERRCODE_INTERNAL_ERROR -99
class CNXDImportHandler private m_pImportPackage private m_pSkippedObjectDict private m_pImportMsg private m_nError
private m_pObjectMatcher private m_pDestEnvHelper private m_pFieldTranslator private m_pObjectImporter
private m_nUnsavedCounter private m_nObjectCounter private m_nSaveDisableCnt private m_strErrDesc private m_pPerforming private m_pSubTransStack private m_bUpdateExisting
private sub class_initialize() set m_pImportPackage = doc_.system.activex("navoexpimp.importpackage") set m_pSkippedObjectDict = doc_.system.activex("scripting.dictionary") set m_pImportPackage.sink = me set m_pImportMsg = nothing set m_pObjectMatcher = nothing set m_pDestEnvHelper = nothing set m_pFieldTranslator = nothing set m_pObjectImporter = nothing set m_pPerforming = nothing m_nError = 0 m_strErrDesc = "" m_nSaveDisableCnt = 0 m_nUnsavedCounter = 0 m_nObjectCounter = 0 set m_pSubTransStack = doc_.afc.new_navoarray() m_bUpdateExisting = true end sub private sub class_terminate() 'OK cleanup end sub
private sub cleanup() set m_pSubTransStack = nothing
set m_pImportMsg = nothing set m_pObjectMatcher = nothing set m_pDestEnvHelper = nothing set m_pFieldTranslator = nothing set m_pObjectImporter = nothing set m_pSkippedObjectDict = nothing set m_pImportPackage = nothing set m_pPerforming = nothing end sub
public sub required_init(byref pObjectMatcher,byref pDestEnvHelper) set m_pObjectMatcher = pObjectMatcher set m_pDestEnvHelper = pDestEnvHelper end sub
public function go(byref pInputStream) m_pImportPackage.istream pInputStream
show_progress "Rozpoczęcie importu danych"
m_pImportPackage.go
go = m_nError end function
public sub set_field_translator(byref pFieldTranslator) set m_pFieldTranslator = pFieldTranslator end sub
public sub set_object_importer(byref pObjectImporter) set m_pObjectImporter = pObjectImporter end sub
'-- importer interface --- public sub OnMessageBegin(byref pMsgObj,byref bBreak) bBreak = (m_nError <> 0) set m_pImportMsg = pMsgObj end sub public sub OnMessageEnd(pMsgObj,byref bBreak) if m_nError = 0 then if m_nSaveDisableCnt = 0 then if not trans_.saveobjects() then m_nError = ERRCODE_SAVE_FAILED end if end if else cleanup trans_.discard end if
bBreak = (m_nError <> 0) set m_pImportMsg = nothing end sub public sub OnObject(pImpObject,byref bBreak) if pImpObject.isfield("_enter_sub") then dim pSubTrans : set pSubTrans = trans_.createsubtran() pSubTrans.autorollback false m_pSubTransStack.add pSubTrans set pSubTrans = nothing end if if pImpObject.isfield("_begin_unit") then enablesave = false end if if pImpObject.typeid >= TYPEID_FIRST_STANDARD then dim pStdObjDef : set pStdObjDef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pImpObject.typeid)
if pStdObjDef.child then m_nError = std_import_child_object(me,pImpObject) else m_nError = std_import_object(me,pImpObject) end if else if pImpObject.typeid = TYPEID_SELFMAPID then dim idSelfMapType : idSelfMapType = clng(pImpObject("_selfmap_typeid")) dim idSelfMapIdObj: idSelfMapIdObj= clng(pImpObject("_selfmap_idobj")) setmapid idSelfMapType,idSelfMapIdObj,idSelfMapIdObj end if end if if m_nError = 0 then if pImpObject.isfield("_save_now") then if not trans_.save() then errordesc = "Zachowanie danych nieudane" m_nError = ERRCODE_SAVE_FAILED end if m_nUnsavedCounter = 0 end if end if if pImpObject.isfield("_leave_sub") then set m_pSubTransStack.Value(m_pSubTransStack.UpperIndex) = nothing m_pSubTransStack.Remove m_pSubTransStack.UpperIndex end if if pImpObject.isfield("_end_unit") then enablesave = true end if '-- autosave m_nUnsavedCounter = m_nUnsavedCounter + 1
if m_nError = 0 then if m_nUnsavedCounter > AUTOSAVE_COUNT and (m_nSaveDisableCnt = 0) then show_progress "Zachowywanie danych..." if not trans_.save() then errordesc = "Auto-zachowanie danych nieudane" m_nError = ERRCODE_SAVE_FAILED end if m_nUnsavedCounter = 0 end if end if '-- bBreak = (m_nError <> 0) end sub '------ public function resolve_ref(byval nTypeId,byval idSrcObj) if idSrcObj = 0 then set resolve_ref = nothing else if doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(nTypeId).child then dim nDestParentType dim idSrcParent dim strListField dim nListLP dim idDestChild : idDestChild = m_pImportMsg.getmapidex(nTypeId,idSrcObj,nDestParentType,idSrcParent,strListField,nListLP)
set resolve_ref = trans_.getobj(nDestParentType, _ m_pImportMsg.mapid(nDestParentType,idSrcParent)). _ field(strListField).get(nListLP) else if m_pImportMsg.mapid(nTypeId,idSrcObj) = clng(0) then if idSrcObj > clng(0) then set resolve_ref = trans_.getobj(nTypeId,idSrcObj) end if else set resolve_ref = trans_.getobj(nTypeId,m_pImportMsg.mapid(nTypeId,idSrcObj)) end if end if end if end function
public sub setmapid(byval nTypeId,byval idSrcObj,byval idDestObj) m_pImportMsg.mapid(nTypeId,idSrcObj) = idDestObj end sub
public sub setmapidex(byval nTypeId,byval idSrcObj,byval idDestObj,byval nParentTypeId,byval nParentIdObj,_ byval strParentList,byval nParentLP) m_pImportMsg.setmapidex nTypeId,idSrcObj,idDestObj,nParentTypeId,nParentIdObj,strParentList,nParentLP end sub
'0 - insert '>0 - update public function find_match(byref pImpObject) find_match = m_pObjectMatcher(pImpObject,me) end function
public function prepare_object_env(byref pImpObject,byval idDestObj) prepare_object_env = m_pDestEnvHelper(pImpObject,idDestObj,me) end function
public property let enablesave(byval bEnable) if bEnable then m_nSaveDisableCnt = m_nSaveDisableCnt - 1 else m_nSaveDisableCnt = m_nSaveDisableCnt + 1 end if end property
public property let errordesc(byval strDesc) m_strErrDesc = m_strErrDesc + strDesc + vbCrLf end property
public property get errordesc() errordesc = m_strErrDesc end property
public property let updateexisting(byval bUpdate) m_bUpdateExisting = bUpdate end property
public property get updateexisting() updateexisting = m_bUpdateExisting end property
public sub hide_progress() set m_pPerforming = nothing end sub
public sub show_progress(strText) if m_pPerforming is nothing then set m_pPerforming = doc_.performing(strText) else m_pPerforming.text = strText end if end sub
public function import_object_fields(byref pImpObject,byref pDestStdObj) if m_pObjectImporter is nothing then import_object_fields = std_import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj) else import_object_fields = m_pObjectImporter(Me,pImpObject,pDestStdObj) end if end function
public sub on_object_imported(byref pObject) if m_nObjectCounter mod 10 = 0 then show_progress "Zaimportowano: " + pObject.getobjdef.humanname + " (" + pObject.text + ")" end if m_nObjectCounter = m_nObjectCounter + 1 end sub
'robi translację pola public function translate(byref pDestStdObj,byref pFieldDef,byref varValue) if m_pFieldTranslator is nothing then translate = true else translate = m_pFieldTranslator(pDestStdObj,pFieldDef,varValue) end if end function
'standardowa implementacja importu pól public function std_import_object_fields(byref pImpObject,byref pDestStdObj) std_import_object_fields = 0 pDestStdObj.recalcenabled = false
if pImpObject.isfield("_with_recalc") then pDestStdObj.recalcenabled = true end if
dim pStdObjDef : set pStdObjDef = doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pImpObject.typeid) dim pFieldDef dim iter : iter = 0
for each pFieldDef in pStdObjDef
if pImpObject.isfield(pFieldDef.name) then if iter <> 0 then 'pomijamy idobj select case pFieldDef.type case RELT_EMBED,RELT_ENUM 'wbudowane if not pFieldDef.iscomputed() then dim varValue 'trim text fields if pFieldDef.sqltype < SQLsmall then dim nFldLen : nFldLen = pFieldDef.sqltype if nFldLen > 8192 then nFldLen = nFldLen - 8192 end if varValue = rtrim(left(pImpObject(pFieldDef.name),nFldLen)) else varValue = pImpObject(pFieldDef.name) end if if translate(pDestStdObj,pFieldDef,varValue) then pDestStdObj.field(iter) = varValue end if end if case RELT_REF 'ref dim idRef : idRef = clng(pImpObject(pFieldDef.name)) if translate(pDestStdObj,pFieldDef,idRef) then if idRef <> 0 then set pDestStdObj.field(iter) = resolve_ref(pFieldDef.reftypeid,idRef) else set pDestStdObj.field(iter) = nothing end if end if case RELT_WILDREF: 'dzika ref dim idWildRef : idWildRef = clng(pImpObject(pFieldDef.name)) if translate(pDestStdObj,pFieldDef,idWildRef) then if idWildRef <> 0 then dim nWildRefType : nWildRefType = clng(pImpObject(pFieldDef.name + "_wrt")) set pDestStdObj.field(iter) = resolve_ref(nWildRefType,idWildRef) else set pDestStdObj.field(iter) = nothing end if end if case RELT_FILE 'plik with pDestStdObj.field(iter) .attach pImpObject(pFieldDef.name)
if pImpObject.isfield(pFieldDef.name + "_ext") then .ext = pImpObject(pFieldDef.name + "_ext") end if
end with end select end if end if
iter = iter + 1 next pDestStdObj.recalcenabled = true end function
public sub add_to_skipped(byval nTypeId,byval nSrcIdObj) m_pSkippedObjectDict.Add cstr(nTypeId) + ";" + cstr(nSrcIdObj), true #ifdef _DEBUG trans_.message 0,0,"import skipped " + cstr(nTypeId) + ";" + cstr(nSrcIdObj) #endif end sub public function is_skipped(byval nTypeId,byval nSrcIdObj) is_skipped = m_pSkippedObjectDict.exists(cstr(nTypeId) + ";" + cstr(nSrcIdObj)) end function end class
class CNXDPeekHeader private m_pImportPackage private m_pHeader
private sub class_initialize() set m_pImportPackage = doc_.system.activex("navoexpimp.importpackage") set m_pImportPackage.sink = me set m_pHeader = nothing end sub
public function go(byref pInputStream) m_pImportPackage.istream pInputStream m_pImportPackage.go end function
public sub OnMessageBegin(byref pMsgObj,byref bBreak) set m_pHeader = pMsgObj.header bBreak = true end sub public sub OnMessageEnd(pMsgObj,byref bBreak) end sub public sub OnObject(pImpObject,byref bBreak) end sub
public property get header() set header = m_pHeader end property end class
function std_import_object(byref pHandler,byref pImpObject)
std_import_object = 0
dim idDestObj : idDestObj = pHandler.find_match(pImpObject) if idDestObj <= -1 then 'error pHandler.errordesc = "Skojarzenie dla obiektu typu " +_ doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pImpObject.typeid).humanname +_ " [" + cstr(pImpObject.typeid) + "," + cstr(pImpObject.idobj) + "] nieudane" std_import_object = ERRCODE_MATCH_FAILED exit function end if
dim nMatchMode : nMatchMode = clng(DEFAULT_MATCH_MODE) #ifndef _CTP if pImpObject.isfield("_match_mode") then nMatchMode = clng(pImpObject("_match_mode")) end if #endif
dim bUpdateFields if idDestObj = 0 then bUpdateFields = ((nMatchMode and 1) = 1)
if not bUpdateFields then
pHandler.errordesc = "Wstawienie nowego obiektu niedozwolone dla obiektu typu " +_ doc_.stdobjdef.getobjdef(pImpObject.typeid).humanname + " ["+ cstr(pImpObject.typeid) +_ "," + cstr(pImpObject.idobj) + "]" std_import_object = ERRCODE_INSERT_NOTALLWD exit function end if else bUpdateFields = ((nMatchMode and 2) = 2) end if
if bUpdateFields then
dim pDestStdObj
std_import_object = pHandler.prepare_object_env(pImpObject,idDestObj) if std_import_object <> 0 then pHandler.errordesc = "Przygotowanie środowiska dla obiektu typu="+ cstr(pImpObject.typeid) +_ " i idobj=" + cstr(pImpObject.idobj) + " nieudane" std_import_object = ERRCODE_INTERNAL_ERROR exit function end if
if idDestObj = 0 then set pDestStdObj = trans_.newobj(pImpObject.typeid) if pDestStdObj is nothing then std_import_object = ERRCODE_NEWOBJ_FAILED pHandler.errordesc = "Utworzenie obiektu typu="+ cstr(pImpObject.typeid) +_ " nieudane" exit function end if else set pDestStdObj = trans_.getobj(pImpObject.typeid,idDestObj) if pDestStdObj is nothing then std_import_object = ERRCODE_GETOBJ_FAILED pHandler.errordesc = "Utworzenie obiektu typu="+ cstr(pImpObject.typeid) +_ " i idobj=" + cstr(pImpObject.idobj) + " nieudane" exit function end if end if
idDestObj = pDestStdObj.idobj
'import fields as usual std_import_object = pHandler.import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj) pHandler.on_object_imported pDestStdObj else pHandler.add_to_skipped pImpObject.typeid,pImpObject.idobj end if
'store mapping (always when possible) if(std_import_object = 0) then if idDestObj <> 0 then pHandler.setmapid pImpObject.typeid,pImpObject.idobj,idDestObj end if end if end function
function std_import_child_object(byref pHandler,byref pImpObject) std_import_child_object = 0
dim pDestStdObj : set pDestStdObj = nothing dim nParentType : nParentType = clng(pImpObject("_parent_type")) dim idSrcParent : idSrcParent = clng(pImpObject("_parent_idobj")) dim strListFld : strListFld = cstr(pImpObject("_parent_list")) dim nLP : nLP = clng(pImpObject("_list_lp"))
dim pDestParent : set pDestParent = pHandler.resolve_ref(nParentType,idSrcParent) dim pListField : set pListField = pDestParent.field(strListFld)
dim bUpdateFields : bUpdateFields = not pHandler.is_skipped(nParentType,idSrcParent)
if pListField.exists(nLP) then set pDestStdObj = pListField.get(nLP) else if bUpdateFields then set pDestStdObj = pListField.addnew() nLP = pListField.count() end if end if
if bUpdateFields then 'import fields as usual std_import_child_object = pHandler.import_object_fields(pImpObject,pDestStdObj)
if pImpObject.isfield("_last_child") then 'remove extra elements from list do while pListField.exists(nLP+1) pListField.delete pListField.count() loop end if else pHandler.add_to_skipped pImpObject.typeid,pImpObject.idobj end if
'store mapping (child version) - when possible
if(std_import_child_object = 0) then if not pDestStdObj is nothing then pHandler.setmapidex pImpObject.typeid,pImpObject.idobj,pDestStdObj.idobj,_ pDestParent.type,idSrcParent,strListFld,nLP end if end if end function
function new_import_handler() set new_import_handler = new CNXDImportHandler end function
function retrieve_header(byref pSO) dim pNXDPeekHeader : set pNXDPeekHeader = new CNXDPeekHeader pNXDPeekHeader.go pSO set retrieve_header = pNXDPeekHeader end function
